subtopics.title: Safety Rules in the Workshop
common_misconceptions: Accidents only happen to careless people
First aid is only for serious injuries
subtopics.teaching_note: Workshop safety rules: 1) Wear appropriate clothing (no loose items). 2) Use safety equipment (goggles, gloves). 3) Keep workshop clean and tidy. 4) Know location of fire extinguishers and first aid box. 5) Report all accidents immediately. 6) Never operate machines without supervision. 7) Tie back long hair. Common workshop hazards: cuts from tools, burns from hot materials, eye injuries, electric shocks. First aid: immediate treatment before medical help arrives.
